---
title: "Brandon Russell, Ed.D."
subtitle: "Cybersecurity educator and U.S. Air Force cyber officer. I write on Medium, teach on Maven, build on GitHub, and index it all here."
pagetitle: "Brandon Russell"
description-meta: "Personal site of Brandon Russell, cybersecurity educator, U.S. Air Force cyber officer, and Ed.D. in educational leadership. Hub for writing, courses, software projects, and publications."
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/brandon-r-russell/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Brandon-Russell-1
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/Dr_BRussell
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@Dr.BrandonRussell
    - icon: medium
      text: Medium
      href: https://medium.com/@brandon.r.russell.1
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:brandon.r.russell.1@gmail.com
---

I am a U.S. Air Force cyber officer and instructor supervisor at one of the Air Force's primary technical schoolhouses for cyber and communications officers. I hold a doctorate in educational leadership and am preparing for the next chapter: teaching cybersecurity and aviation systems at the university level.

My background spans two technical worlds. I came up through aircraft electrical and avionics maintenance, then moved into cyber. That combination of hands-on systems work, modern offensive and defensive cyber, and a doctoral-level study of how adults actually learn is what I bring into a classroom and into client engagements.

I hold **CISSP**, **OSCP**, **OSWP**, **Security+**, **TS/SCI**, and **CCAF Master Instructor** credentials, and I am pursuing **PMP** and **FAA Airframe and Powerplant** certification through the military experience pathway.

If you are a department chair, hiring manager, or program lead in cybersecurity, computer science, aviation, or aerospace, or you want to bring me in for a cohort course or guest lecture, I would be glad to talk: [brandon.r.russell.1@gmail.com](mailto:brandon.r.russell.1@gmail.com).

[Full CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} &nbsp; [Email](mailto:brandon.r.russell.1@gmail.com){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

## How this site is organized

This site is the index. The work itself lives where the audience for it lives:

| Where | What I do there |
|---|---|
| [**Medium** ↗](https://medium.com/@brandon.r.russell.1) | Writing on offensive security, training, and the philosophy of education. New essays appear there first; the [Writing](writing.qmd) page collects them. |
| [**Maven** ↗](teaching.qmd#maven-cohort-courses) | Cohort-based courses on practical offensive security and instructional design (in development). Listed under [Teaching](teaching.qmd). |
| [**GitHub** ↗](https://github.com/Brandon-Russell-1) | Offensive security tooling, lab automation, and instructional utilities. Curated on [Projects](projects.qmd). |
| [**YouTube** ↗](https://www.youtube.com/@Dr.BrandonRussell) | Walk-throughs, talks, and instructional design notes. Indexed on [Speaking](speaking.qmd). |
| [**This site**](about.qmd) | The hub, bio, [CV](cv.qmd), [Publications](publications.qmd), and how to [reach me](contact.qmd). |

## Currently

- Teaching across cybersecurity, computer science, aviation, and aerospace topics, see [Teaching](teaching.qmd).
- Running cohort-based courses for working professionals on [Maven](teaching.qmd#maven-cohort-courses).
- Writing on cybersecurity training, offensive security, and instructional design, on [Medium](https://medium.com/@brandon.r.russell.1) and [here](writing.qmd).
- Open to professor of practice, senior lecturer, and adjunct conversations with cybersecurity, computer science, aviation, and aerospace programs.
- Available for selective consulting in cybersecurity training program design and offensive security assessment scoping.

## Writing & speaking

See [Writing](writing.qmd), [Publications](publications.qmd), [Medium](https://medium.com/@brandon.r.russell.1), and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Dr.BrandonRussell).
